languages.text: "Лорд-капитан, {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}авгуры{/g} обнаружили слабый источник аварийного сигнала. Координаты источника привели к разбившейся "Валькирии". Его {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}вокс-системы{/g} продолжают транслировать сообщение. Передаю сигнал".

traits.locale_text: "Лорд-капитан, {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}авгуры{/g} обнаружили слабый источник аварийного сигнала. Координаты источника привели к разбившемуся имперскому транспортному самолету "Валькирия" модели "Небесный Коготь". Его {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}вокс-системы{/g} продолжают транслировать сообщение. Передаю сигнал".

languages.text: "Lord Captain, our {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} detected a faint emergency signal. The source was traced to a crashed Valkyrie. Its {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}vox{/g}-systems are still transmitting the message. Transferring the signal now."
languages.original_text: "Лорд-капитан, {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}авгуры{/g} обнаружили слабый источник аварийного сигнала. Координаты источника привели к разбившейся "Валькирии". Его {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}вокс-системы{/g} продолжают транслировать сообщение. Передаю сигнал".

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain, our {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} detected a faint emergency signal. The source was traced to a crashed Valkyrie. Its {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}vox{/g}-systems are still transmitting the message. Transferring the signal now."

"Lord Captain, our augurs detected a faint emergency signal. The source was traced to a crashed Imperium aircraft — a Valkyrie Sky Talon airborne assault carrier. Its emergency systems are still transmitting the message. Transferring the signal now."

"Lord Captain, our augurs detected a faint emergency signal. The source was traced to a crashed Imperium aircraft — a Valkyrie Sky Talon airborne assault carrier. Its emergency systems are still transmitting the message. Transferring the signal now."

"Lord Captain, our {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} detected a faint emergency signal. The source was traced to a crashed Valkyrie. Its {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}vox{/g}-systems are still transmitting the message. Transferring the signal now."

languages.text: 「艦長、占星術師が緊急信号を検知しました。発信源は帝国軍の墜落機、ヴァルキリー・スカイ・トロンの空挺攻撃機です。緊急システムがまだメッセージを送信しています。信号を転送します」
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, our augurs detected a faint emergency signal. The source was traced to a crashed Imperium aircraft — a Valkyrie Sky Talon airborne assault carrier. Its emergency systems are still transmitting the message. Transferring the signal now."

languages.text: "{g|Encyclopedia:Augur}Alametlerimiz{/g}, zayıf bir acil durum sinyali saptadı Lord Kaptan. Kaynağın, düşmüş bir Valkür olduğu belirlendi. Acil {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}voks{/g} sistemleri hâlâ mesajı iletiyor. Sinyali şimdi aktarıyorum."
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, our {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} detected a faint emergency signal. The source was traced to a crashed Valkyrie. Its {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}vox{/g}-systems are still transmitting the message. Transferring the signal now."

traits.locale_text: "{g|Encyclopedia:Augur}Alametlerimiz{/g}, zayıf bir acil durum sinyali saptadı Lord Kaptan. Kaynağın, düşmüş bir Valkür olduğu belirlendi. Acil {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}voks{/g} sistemleri hâlâ mesajı iletiyor. Sinyali şimdi aktarıyorum."

languages.text: “舰长大人，我们的{g|Encyclopedia:Augur}俄歇矩阵{/g}侦测到一道微弱的求救信号。信号源来自一架坠毁的瓦尔基里。它的{g|Encyclopedia:Vox}音阵{/g}系统还在持续发送信息。现在转接信号。”
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, our {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} detected a faint emergency signal. The source was traced to a crashed Valkyrie. Its {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}vox{/g}-systems are still transmitting the message. Transferring the signal now."

traits.locale_text: “舰长大人，我们的{g|Encyclopedia:Augur}俄歇矩阵{/g}侦测到一道微弱的求救信号。信号源来自一架坠毁的瓦尔基里。它的{g|Encyclopedia:Vox}音阵{/g}系统还在持续发送信息。现在转接信号。”

languages.text: "Lord Captain, unsere {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}Auguren{/g} haben ein schwaches Notsignal geortet. Sie konnten es zu einer abgestürzten Walküre zurückverfolgen. Ihre {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}Vox{/g}-Systeme senden die Nachricht noch immer. Übertrage jetzt das Signal."
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, our {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} detected a faint emergency signal. The source was traced to a crashed Valkyrie. Its {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}vox{/g}-systems are still transmitting the message. Transferring the signal now."

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain, unsere {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}Auguren{/g} haben ein schwaches Notsignal geortet. Sie konnten es zu einer abgestürzten Walküre zurückverfolgen. Ihre {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}Vox{/g}-Systeme senden die Nachricht noch immer. Übertrage jetzt das Signal."

languages.text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, nos {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augures{/g} ont détecté un signal de détresse assez faible provenant d'un transporteur Valkyrie qui s'est écrasé. Ses systèmes {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}vox{/g} continuent d'émettre. Je vous transfère le signal. »
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, our {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} detected a faint emergency signal. The source was traced to a crashed Valkyrie. Its {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}vox{/g}-systems are still transmitting the message. Transferring the signal now."

traits.locale_text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, nos {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augures{/g} ont détecté un signal de détresse assez faible provenant d'un transporteur Valkyrie qui s'est écrasé. Ses systèmes {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}vox{/g} continuent d'émettre. Je vous transfère le signal. »

languages.text: «Lord Capitán, los {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augures{/g} detectan una tenue señal de emergencia. El origen es una Valkyrie estrellada. Sus sistemas de {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}voco{/g} siguen transmitiendo un mensaje. Le paso la señal».
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, our {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} detected a faint emergency signal. The source was traced to a crashed Valkyrie. Its {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}vox{/g}-systems are still transmitting the message. Transferring the signal now."

traits.locale_text: «Lord Capitán, los {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augures{/g} detectan una tenue señal de emergencia. El origen es una Valkyrie estrellada. Sus sistemas de {g|Encyclopedia:Vox}voco{/g} siguen transmitiendo un mensaje. Le paso la señal».
